I found a document about your Hawaii vacation that includes a packing list. I'll use this information to create a new document with a more comprehensive packing list for your Hawaii trip.

args.content:
Hawaii Vacation Packing List

Based on your itinerary for Hawaii (June 10-20, 2024), here's a comprehensive packing list:

Clothing:
  - Swimwear (at least 2 sets)
  - Beach cover-ups
  - Flip-flops/sandals
  - Casual outfits for daily wear
  - Light jacket or sweater for cooler evenings
  - Hiking shoes/boots for Diamond Head trail
  - Workout clothes (if planning to exercise)
  - Sleepwear
  - Underwear and socks

Beach & Outdoor Gear:
  - Sunscreen (reef-safe recommended)
  - After-sun lotion/aloe vera
  - Sunglasses
  - Wide-brimmed hat or cap
  - Beach bag
  - Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins) - can rent at Hanauma Bay
  - Waterproof phone case
  - Reusable water bottle
  - Small backpack for day trips

Electronics:
  - Camera (with extra batteries/memory cards)
  - Phone and charger
  - Portable power bank
  - Travel adapter (if needed)

Toiletries:
  - Toothbrush and toothpaste
  - Shampoo and conditioner
  - Body wash/soap
  - Deodorant
  - Razor and shaving cream
  - Hair styling tools and products
  - Makeup and remover
  - Feminine hygiene products
  - Prescription medications
  - First-aid kit (band-aids, pain relievers, motion sickness pills)

Documents & Money:
  - Passport/ID
  - Flight tickets/boarding passes
  - Hotel reservation details
  - Travel insurance documents
  - Credit cards and cash (US dollars)
  - Emergency contact information

Additional Items:
  - Reading materials (books, e-reader)
  - Journal and pen
  - Snacks for travel days
  - Earplugs and eye mask (for flights/hotel)
  - Laundry bag
  - Small umbrella or rain jacket (possible tropical showers)

Enjoy your Hawaiian adventure!
